name: codex-commit-message
description: Generate Git commit messages from the VS Code Source Control input box with Codex CLI.

codexCommitMessage.codexPath.description: Fallback path to the Codex CLI executable. TOML key: codex.path.

codexCommitMessage.configPath.description: Optional TOML config path. Supports ~. Empty uses ~/.config/codex-commit-message/config.toml plus workspace .codex-commit-message.toml.

codexCommitMessage.model.description: Fallback Codex model override. TOML key: codex.model.

codexCommitMessage.timeoutMs.description: Fallback maximum time to wait for Codex CLI commit-message generation. TOML key: codex.timeout_ms.

codexCommitMessage.reasoningEffort.description: Fallback model_reasoning_effort override passed to Codex CLI. TOML key: codex.reasoning_effort.

codexCommitMessage.maxDiffBytes.description: Fallback maximum diff size sent to Codex CLI. TOML key: codex.max_diff_bytes.

codexCommitMessage.diffMode.description: Fallback Git diff selection. TOML key: codex.diff_mode.

codexCommitMessage.ignoreRules.description: Fallback value for passing --ignore-rules to Codex CLI. TOML key: codex.ignore_rules.

codexCommitMessage.conventionalCommits.description: Fallback Conventional Commits preference. TOML key: message.conventional_commits.

codexCommitMessage.additionalInstruction.description: Fallback extra instructions appended to the Codex commit-message prompt. TOML key: codex.additional_instructions.
